task.title: Implement multi-workspace support spec in repo-local worktree

events.content: Scoped dedup and DM participant caches by workspace: Scoped dedup and DM participant caches by workspace

raw.question: Scoped dedup and DM participant caches by workspace
raw.chosen: Scoped dedup and DM participant caches by workspace
raw.reasoning: Merged websocket fan-in can reuse event IDs or conversation IDs across workspaces, so broker-side dedup and participant resolution must include workspace identity to avoid cross-workspace drops and cache poisoning.

events.content: Kept legacy single-workspace envs as default-workspace compatibility surfaces: Kept legacy single-workspace envs as default-workspace compatibility surfaces

raw.question: Kept legacy single-workspace envs as default-workspace compatibility surfaces
raw.chosen: Kept legacy single-workspace envs as default-workspace compatibility surfaces
raw.reasoning: Child processes and older dashboards still expect RELAY_API_KEY/workspaceKey semantics, so the runtime now exposes multi-workspace memberships while preserving a default workspace for legacy flows.

retrospective.summary: Implemented multi-workspace auth, fan-in websocket sessions, workspace-aware routing, listen API selection, and wrap/PTy injection context with green cargo check/test.
